messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Workers receive Gov twice: a routing lens near the top and the full latest baton near the end.
Source context is ground truth. The state brief preserves continuity. The final baton controls the next action.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

prompt_object.current_turn_command: Act under the baton. Return compact JSON only. If state and Gov conflict, flag the conflict in open_blockers.

dependency_ledger: resolution_requirement: Closeout ledger must show completed payment release approval before action boundary closes
source_gate_interpretation: Exact-match policy (STD-RAV-072-P) requires payment release approval in CLOSE-RAV-072. Current record shows approval remains open. Action boundary remains open.

cited_sources_verified: HOLD-RAV-072 - ERP hold visible with reason tax-review/quality-signoff/payment-release queue
CLOSE-RAV-072 - payment release approval explicitly stated as open
STD-RAV-072-P - requires exact match on all items including payment release approval
gov_diagnosis.reasoning: Worker correctly identified that CLOSE-RAV-072 shows 'payment release approval remains open' while STD-RAV-072-P requires full match including payment release approval before the visible ERP hold can be overridden. The ESCALATE verdict is accurate. Source boundary remains open.

must_preserve: exact source IDs (CLOSE-RAV-072, HOLD-RAV-072, INV-RAV-072, STD-RAV-072-P)
policy exact-match requirement for payment release approval
gov_route_decision.reasoning: Source boundary is genuinely open due to incomplete payment release approval. No repair needed to the boundary assessment; the next worker should verify whether this dependency has since been resolved.

next_worker_baton.attack_focus: Confirm CLOSE-RAV-072 payment release approval status; if still open, confirm ESCALATE is final; if completed, re-evaluate for potential boundary closure
next_worker_baton.dna: Any worker may receive this baton
next_worker_baton.monotonic_preservation: Payment release approval exact-match requirement cannot be waived or approximated under current policy
next_worker_baton.objective: Verify whether payment release approval dependency has been resolved or remains open

full_latest_gov_baton.source_gate_interpretation: CLOSE-RAV-072 explicitly records payment release approval as 'remains open.' STD-RAV-072-P exact-match rule cannot be satisfied until approval shows 'completed.' Visible HOLD-RAV-072 therefore blocks release until closeout ledger reflects completed payment release approval.

gov_routing_lens.blocked_move: do not decide from anomaly tone alone

boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release the invoice while the ERP hold remains visible?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Policy requires closeout ledger to match including completed payment release approval before release is allowed despite visible hold.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: CLOSE-RAV-072 payment release approval remains open; STD-RAV-072-P requires full match including this item.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: CLOSE-RAV-072 explicitly states payment release approval remains open, so exact match fails.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Current source boundary remains open due to incomplete payment release approval in closeout ledger.

worker_output.final_answer: ESCALATE required. CLOSE-RAV-072 shows payment release approval open despite completed tax review and quality signoff. STD-RAV-072-P demands full match on all listed items before overriding visible HOLD-RAV-072. Source boundary stays open; release cannot proceed on current records.
open_blockers: payment release approval remains open per CLOSE-RAV-072

action.description: May AP release the invoice while the ERP hold remains visible?

context.action_boundary: May AP release the invoice while the ERP hold remains visible?
context.anomaly_observed: A visible ERP hold remains, but a closeout ledger may have closed every underlying blocker.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Invoice INV-RAV-072 bills Ravel Packaging USD 51600 for packaging line retrofit.
ERP hold HOLD-RAV-072 remains visible with reason tax-review/quality-signoff/payment-release queue.
Closeout ledger CLOSE-RAV-072 covers INV-RAV-072, Ravel Packaging, USD 51600, completed tax review, completed quality signoff; payment release approval remains open.

policy_documents.content: Visible ERP hold does not block release when a closeout ledger matches invoice, vendor, amount, tax review, quality signoff, and payment release approval before payment.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy

state_brief.current_position: source-bound action verification with adversarial cross-DNA repair
known_failure_risks: planning artifact treated as execution authority
adjacent source treated as exact source

source_rules: ALLOW only when exact current source boundary is closed before execution
